dataset: 252 synthetic daily bars, 10 features, 2 synthetic regimes, BIC selection over candidate_states=(3,4,5), n_init=3
source: tests/hmm/test_performance.py's scenario, re-run standalone with resource.getrusage wrapped around RegimeService.train
known_gaps: inference_ms_per_call measures RegimeService.infer, which re-runs the batch Forward Algorithm over the entire supplied 252-bar window every call -- not the incremental, O(1)-per-call ForwardFilter.update() live workload production is expected to actually use. See docs/engineering-handbook/Architecture/ADR/ADR-007-HMM-Design.md Decision 7: that incremental path is deliberately deferred and has no benchmark yet -- add one (a much smaller, sub-5ms number) once it's built and has a real consumer.
memory_mb is whole-process peak RSS including numpy/scipy/hmmlearn import overhead, not training's incremental memory cost alone -- see benchmarks/README.md's methodology note.
